016package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.controller;
017
018import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto.UserProfileResponse;
019import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto.UpdateAvatarRequest;
020import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto.UpdateDisplayNameRequest;
021import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto.UpdateEmailRequest;
022import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto.UpdateUserRequest;
023import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.UserProfile;
024import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.UserService;
025import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.storage.StorageService;
026import java.io.IOException;
027import java.util.UUID;
028import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
029import org.springframework.core.io.Resource;
030import org.springframework.http.MediaType;
031import org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;
032import org.springframework.web.HttpMediaTypeException;
033import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
034import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PatchMapping;
035import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;
036import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PutMapping;
037import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;
038import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
039import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMethod;
040import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestPart;
041import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
042import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
043
044/**
045 * REST controller for user profile operations. This controller exposes endpoints for retrieving and
046 * updating user profile information. All operations require authentication.
047 */
048@RestController
049@RequestMapping("/users")
050public class UserController {
051
052  private final UserService service;
053  private final StorageService storageService;
054
055  /**
056   * Constructs an instance of {@code UserController} with the specified services.
057   *
058   * @param service User service for business logic operations.
059   * @param storageService Storage service for file uploads.
060   */
061  @Autowired
062  public UserController(UserService service, StorageService storageService) {
063    this.service = service;
064    this.storageService = storageService;
065  }
066
067  /**
068   * Returns the user profile for the currently authenticated user. If the user does not already
069   * exist in the system, a new profile will be created automatically.
070   *
071   * @return User profile for the authenticated user.
072   */
073  @GetMapping(value = "/me", produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE)
074  public UserProfileResponse get() {
075    UserProfile current = service.getMe();
076    return service.getUserProfileResponse(current);
077  }
078
079  /**
080   * Updates the display name for the currently authenticated user.
081   *
082   * @param request Request containing the new display name.
083   * @return Updated user profile.
084   */
085  @PutMapping(value = "/me/display-name", consumes = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE,
086      produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE)
087  public UserProfile updateDisplayName(@RequestBody UpdateDisplayNameRequest request) {
088    UserProfile current = service.getCurrentUser();
089    return service.updateDisplayName(current.getId(), request.getDisplayName());
090  }
091
092  /**
093   * Updates the email address for the currently authenticated user.
094   *
095   * @param request Request containing the new email address.
096   * @return Updated user profile.
097   */
098  @PutMapping(value = "/me/email", consumes = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE,
099      produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE)
100  public UserProfile updateEmail(@RequestBody UpdateEmailRequest request) {
101    UserProfile current = service.getCurrentUser();
102    return service.updateEmail(current.getId(), request.getEmail());
103  }
104
105  /**
106   * Updates the avatar URL for the currently authenticated user.
107   *
108   * @param request Request containing the new avatar URL.
109   * @return Updated user profile.
110   */
111  @PutMapping(value = "/me/avatar", consumes = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE,
112      produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE)
113  public UserProfile updateAvatar(@RequestBody UpdateAvatarRequest request) {
114    UserProfile current = service.getCurrentUser();
115    return service.updateAvatar(current.getId(), request.getAvatar());
116  }
117
118  /**
119   * Updates user profile fields (display name and/or email) in a single request.
120   *
121   * @param request Request containing the fields to update (nullable fields are ignored).
122   * @return Updated user profile.
123   */
124  @PatchMapping(value = "/me", consumes = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE,
125      produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE)
126  public UserProfileResponse updateProfile(@RequestBody UpdateUserRequest request) {
127    UserProfile current = service.getCurrentUser();
128    UserProfile updated = current;
129
130    if (request.getDisplayName() != null) {
131      updated = service.updateDisplayName(current.getId(), request.getDisplayName());
132    }
133
134    if (request.getEmail() != null) {
135      updated = service.updateEmail(updated.getId(), request.getEmail());
136    }
137
138    return service.getUserProfileResponse(updated);
139  }
140
141  /**
142   * Uploads a new avatar image for the currently authenticated user.
143   * The uploaded file is stored and the user's avatar URL is updated to point to the dedicated
144   * backend-served avatar endpoint.
145   *
146   * @param avatar The avatar image file to upload (preferred part name).
147   * @param file Alternate part name supported for consistency with other upload endpoints.
148   * @return Updated user profile with new avatar URL.
149   * @throws IOException If file upload fails.
150   * @throws HttpMediaTypeException If the file type is not supported.
151   */
152  @RequestMapping(
153      value = "/me/avatar",
154      method = {RequestMethod.POST, RequestMethod.PUT},
155      consumes = MediaType.MULTIPART_FORM_DATA_VALUE,
156      produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE
157  )
158  public UserProfile uploadAvatarImage(
159      @RequestPart(value = "avatar", required = false) MultipartFile avatar,
160      @RequestPart(value = "file", required = false) MultipartFile file
161  )
162      throws IOException, HttpMediaTypeException {
163    UserProfile current = service.getCurrentUser();
164    MultipartFile selected = (avatar != null) ? avatar : file;
165    if (selected == null) {
166      throw new IllegalArgumentException("Missing avatar file upload.");
167    }
168    String storageKey = storageService.store(selected);
169    String contentType = (selected.getContentType() != null)
170        ? selected.getContentType()
171        : MediaType.APPLICATION_OCTET_STREAM_VALUE;
172    return service.updateAvatarKey(current.getId(), storageKey, contentType);
173  }
174
175  /**
176   * Serves a user's custom avatar (if present) as raw bytes.
177   *
178   * @param externalId user external ID.
179   * @return avatar content as a {@link Resource}.
180   * @throws IOException if storage retrieval fails.
181   */
182  @GetMapping(value = "/{externalId}/avatar", produces = MediaType.ALL_VALUE)
183  public ResponseEntity<Resource> getAvatar(@PathVariable UUID externalId) throws IOException {
184    UserProfile user = service.getByExternalId(externalId)
185        .orElseThrow(() -> new IllegalArgumentException("User not found: " + externalId));
186
187    String key = user.getAvatarKey();
188    if (key == null || key.isBlank()) {
189      // No custom avatar stored; clients should use the user's avatar URL (e.g., Google picture URL).
190      return ResponseEntity.notFound().build();
191    }
192
193    Resource resource = storageService.retrieve(key);
194    String contentType = (user.getAvatarMimeType() != null && !user.getAvatarMimeType().isBlank())
195        ? user.getAvatarMimeType()
196        : MediaType.APPLICATION_OCTET_STREAM_VALUE;
197
198    return ResponseEntity
199        .ok()
200        .contentType(MediaType.parseMediaType(contentType))
201        .body(resource);
202  }
203
204}
